text_original:
The clusters of the pepper plant,
Large and luxuriant, would fill a pint.
That hero there
Is large and peerless.

the pepper plant!
How its shoots extend!

The clusters of the pepper plant,
Large and luxuriant, would fill both your hands.
That hero there
Is large and generous.
O the pepper plant!
How its shoots extend;
